title: Blåhaj Sword Pack
description: A small resourcepack that changes the model and texture of diamond sword (or netherite sword) into Blahaj's.
body:
This is a small resourcepack that changes the model and texture of diamond sword (or netherite sword in 1.16+) into [Blahaj's](https://modrinth.com/mod/blahaj).  

This mod is licensed under the LGPL-2.1 and the original mod is licensed under the [Unlicense](https://github.com/Hibiii/Blahaj/blob/main/LICENSE) which is free to learn from it and incorporate it in your own projects.  

The icon of this project is the Blobhaj by [Heatherhorns](https://www.weasyl.com/~heatherhorns), and is licensed under [Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
